questions.prompt: Is the project isolated from, or interconnected with, a DisCo network?

options.label: Interconnected (will connect to the DisCo feeder)

questions.prompt: Is the state where the site is located operating its own SERC?

options.label: Yes — state has an operational SERC

questions.prompt: Is the land for the array, control room, and distribution under documented community/landowner agreement?

options.label: Yes — written agreement and access rights

questions.prompt: Will any major regulated component be imported into Nigeria?

options.label: Yes — modules, batteries, or inverters from outside Nigeria

regulator.label: Likely primary regulator
regulator.logic: If state-serc=yes AND interconnect=isolated → SERC. Else → NERC.

discoClock.label: DisCo notification clock
discoClock.logic: If interconnect=interconnected → 15 business days; silence = no objection.

imports.label: Import conformity
imports.logic: If imports=yes → SONCAP. If local manufacture used → MANCAP.

coren.label: COREN-signed design
coren.logic: Required for projects above the COREN engineering threshold.

community.label: Community documentation
community.logic: Host Community Agreement on file in all cases; land rights documented per land=yes/no answer.

documents_always: Environmental screening (NESREA if site is sensitive)
